evals.prompt: 把 OAuth 2.0 授权码模式 + PKCE 整理成一份图文并茂、适合 A4 打印成 PDF 的中文讲义，包含流程图、现实案例和参考来源。
evals.expected_output: Produces a print-first handout.html with working files, readable diagrams, per-page screenshots, page-review packets, and sequential subagent review before hand-off.

assertions.text: Output mentions handout.html as the final artifact
Output mentions page-review-manifest.json or equivalent review packet artifact
Output mentions sequential page review rather than batch approval

evals.prompt: 根据这些关键词做成可打印 HTML 教程页：IGCSE Chemistry 0620，preparation of salts，acid + metal / acid + base / precipitation，要求图文结合，不能像网页封面。
evals.expected_output: Produces a dense but readable A4 teaching handout with no learner-facing meta text, no oversized blank lower page regions, and page-by-page review artifacts.

evals.prompt: 我有一份粗糙笔记，想变成图文讲义：Transformer attention、Q/K/V、self-attention、multi-head attention。最后我要手动打印成 PDF。
evals.expected_output: Produces a source-backed printable handout with clear diagrams whose labels are readable at print size, then validates each page sequentially with a review subagent.

assertions.text: Output mentions references or source-backed claims
Output mentions review subagent or sequential page review
